description: Abstract: shared FAST UDP multicast + TCP recovery/replay specification for real-time market data feeds. Extended by market-data-gateway, indices, and regulatory-news blueprints.

actors.name: Data Consumer
actors.description: Licensed client connecting to the multicast or TCP recovery channels

actors.name: Feed Gateway
actors.description: Exchange gateway publishing FAST-encoded UDP multicast streams

fields.name: credentials_valid
fields.label: Whether the client's authentication credentials are valid

fields.name: security_id
fields.label: Security or instrument identifier being subscribed to

delivery.multicast: Real-time UDP multicast feeds A and B (primary + redundant)
delivery.recovery: TCP recovery channel for missed messages and trade history snapshots
delivery.replay: TCP replay channel for on-demand message recovery

protocol.encoding: FAST (Fix Adapted for STreaming) binary encoding
protocol.transport: UDP for multicast, TCP for recovery and replay

session.logon_required: Client must authenticate before receiving data
session.heartbeat: Heartbeat messages must be sent on idle sessions

failover.rule: Client must subscribe to both Feed A and Feed B and deduplicate by sequence number

logon_successful.description: Client successfully authenticates and establishes a data session
logon_successful.result: Session active — client can receive real-time feed data

market_data_published.description: Real-time data updates published to subscribed clients via multicast
market_data_published.result: Data disseminated to all subscribed consumers

auth_failed.description: Client credentials rejected — session not established

errors.message: Authentication failed — check credentials and try again.
Session error — reconnect or contact support.
Sequence gap detected — use TCP recovery channel to fill missing messages.

events.name: feed.data_published
events.description: Real-time feed data published to multicast group

events.name: session.heartbeat
events.description: Heartbeat sent to keep session alive

related.reason: Market data gateway — equities and derivatives

goals.description: Deliver real-time market data via FAST UDP multicast with sub-millisecond latency

success_metrics.measurement: Messages lost vs total published (clients use recovery for gaps)

constraints.description: Must not introduce latency above exchange SLA

tradeoffs.reason: UDP multicast maximises throughput; TCP recovery handles gaps
